title: Learning Development & Organization Development (L&D, OD) Manager (Clementi)  #NKC
description:
Job Description:
We are seeking a dynamic and driven HR professional to support, co-lead, or lead initiatives within Organisational Development (OD) and Learning & Development (L&D) functions. The role aims to drive a high-performing, future-ready workforce.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Support, co-lead, or lead OD programmes and change initiatives in collaboration with stakeholders.

  • Develop and implement OD strategies, tools, and materials to strengthen organisational capability.

  • Drive culture-building initiatives and workshops to foster an engaged, purpose-driven workforce.

  • Contribute to talent management programmes to identify, support, and retain high-potential employees.

  • Partner with business leaders to assess workforce capability gaps and recommend interventions.

  • Conduct learning needs analysis to identify competency gaps aligned with business objectives.

  • Design and implement innovative L&D strategies, platforms, and programmes.

  • Promote a culture of lifelong learning and self-directed development.

  • Manage training administration, including enrolment, feedback, tracking, billing, and vendor management.

  • Support HR and company-wide learning initiatives, including rollout of new learning systems.

  • Drive process improvements through digital tools, data analytics, and automation.

  • Manage training sponsorships and employee development agreements.

  • Participate in rotation across HR and Corporate Communications functions to broaden exposure.

Requirements:

  • MIn Bachelor’s degree in Human Resource Management, Business Administration, or related discipline.





    Interested applicants may email resume to kellychooi@recruitexpress.com.sg

    Chooi Kelly (CEI Registration No: R25136207)

    Recruit Express Pte Ltd (EA: 99C4599)

    We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT EXPRESS PTE LTD
